mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE not_usage = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(not_title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(not_writer) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND not_cdate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND not_cdate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, N.* FROM ( SELECT n.not_no, n.not_title, n.not_content, n.not_writer, e.emp_name AS empName, n.NOT_VIEW_CNT, n.not_cdate, n.not_mdate, n.not_usage FROM notice n
LEFT JOIN emp e ON UPPER(n.not_writer) = UPPER(e.emp_id)
WHERE n.not_usage = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(n.not_title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{search.keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(n.not_writer) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{search.keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(e.emp_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{search.keyword}) || '%' )
AND n.not_cdate >= TO_DATE( #{search.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' )
AND n.not_cdate < TO_DATE( #{search.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) + 1
ORDER BY n.not_cdate DESC
) N ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}

SELECT n.not_no, n.not_title, n.not_content, n.not_writer, e.emp_name AS empName, n.NOT_VIEW_CNT, n.not_cdate, n.not_mdate, n.not_usage FROM notice n
LEFT JOIN emp e ON UPPER(n.not_writer) = UPPER(e.emp_id)
WHERE n.not_no = #{not_no} AND n.not_usage = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT notice_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO notice ( not_no, not_title, not_content, not_writer, NOT_VIEW_CNT, not_cdate, not_usage ) VALUES ( #{not_no}, #{not_title}, #{not_content}, #{not_writer}, 0, SYSDATE, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET not_title = #{not_title}, not_content = #{not_content}, not_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE not_no = #{not_no} AND not_usage = 'Y'
UPDATE notice SET not_usage = 'N', not_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE not_no = #{not_no} AND not_usage = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_file ( file_no, not_no, file_origin_name, file_save_name, file_usage ) VALUES ( notice_file_seq.NEXTVAL, #{not_no}, #{file_origin_name}, #{file_save_name}, 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT file_no, not_no, file_origin_name, file_save_name, file_usage FROM notice_file WHERE not_no = #{not_no} AND file_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY file_no ASC
